description: Product source-of-truth catalog. Lifecycle status for Sense360 product configurations. Validated by tests/test_product_catalog.py. config/webflash-builds.json remains the authoritative WebFlash build matrix; this catalog adds the lifecycle layer on top. PRODUCT-002 extends the catalog to enumerate every legacy/manual product YAML under products/ as legacy-compatible. legacy-compatible entries are NOT WebFlash-shippable: they have no config_string, no artifact_name, no webflash_wrapper, and webflash_build_matrix is false. WebFlash wrappers under products/webflash/ are not standalone products; they appear only as webflash_wrapper on the entry they wrap.

products.notes: Release-One production target. FanTRIAC blocked per HW-005; LED excluded because config string carries no LED token. See docs/release-one.md and docs/release-one-hardware-audit.md.

products.stable_blocker: Stable / full release stays gated and is NOT unblocked by this commissioning: a stable customer release would be a placing-on-the-market act, which reopens COMPLIANCE-001 and requires an external safety + EMC assessment BEFORE that act (docs/decisions/COMPLIANCE-001-RESOLUTION-001.md section 4). The S360-320 is a self-build, open-source (CERN-OHL-P) board that Sense360 never sells, supplies, or places on the market; the experimental lane publishes firmware for self-builders of their own devices only.
products.reason: TRIAC-COMMISSIONING-001 moved this entry out of status: blocked into the experimental self-build mains lane (EXPERIMENTAL-SELF-BUILD-MAINS-LANE) defined by docs/decisions/COMPLIANCE-001-RESOLUTION-001.md section 3. The PACKAGE-TRIAC-001 half of the former blocker is CLEARED, citing the attested proof container docs/package-triac-001-operator-bench-proof.md: the operator bench protocol is complete (Steps A-F PASS on the real Manrose fan-motor load), the full-composition re-confirm is PASS via closure path (a), and the six-cell operator attestation is recorded. The COMPLIANCE-001 half is resolved by market posture: COMPLIANCE-001 is CLOSED (S360-320 is never placed on the market), so the experimental-lane preconditions that record defines (completed PACKAGE-TRIAC-001-class bench protocol + committed signed operator attestation) are met. Gate/zero-cross pins are the schematic-verified IO14/IO13 (TRIAC-PINMAP-CORRECT-001; HW-005 buildability resolved); schematic_status stays schematic-backed (NOT a verified-schematic, safety, or compliance claim). This is a blocker/status change on a mains board: human-review only, never auto-merged.
products.notes: Experimental self-build mains firmware (S360-320 Sense360 TRIAC), published on the experimental channel via the experimental lane (config/release-channel-policy.json experimental_lane). NEVER stable, NEVER recommended, NEVER a customer default, NEVER buyable, NEVER in any kit or kit picker, NEVER in release_one_required_configs. The S360-320 is an open-source CERN-OHL-P design that Sense360 never sells, supplies, or places on the market; builders source and assemble the board themselves, as self-builders of their own devices, entirely at their own risk. The bench proof (docs/package-triac-001-operator-bench-proof.md) is firmware-build + functional bench evidence (operator-attested) only -- it makes NO electrical-safety, isolation, creepage, clearance, EMC, CE/UKCA, or compliance claim; those become assessable obligations only via the COMPLIANCE-001 reopen trigger (a market-placement act, which Sense360 never performs for this board). This catalog flip adds the config/webflash-builds.json experimental row + keeps the products/webflash wrapper so the esphome-public release matrix can build the .bin on a v1.0.0-experimental tag; it does NOT cut a release tag here. Downstream WebFlash one-click import stays gated by WF-IMPORT-TRIAC-001 (webflash_one_click_import_eligible: false), unblocked only once the release is cut. TRIAC blocker/status changes are human-review only, never auto-merged. See docs/decisions/COMPLIANCE-001-RESOLUTION-001.md, docs/package-triac-001-operator-bench-proof.md, docs/hardware/s360-100-core-connector-pin-map.md (J15) and docs/hardware/s360-320-r4-triac.md.
